title: Plain Cut-off Wheel – Hard Ferrous
description: Plain abrasive cut-off wheels designed for hard ferrous materials. Suitable for standard abrasive cutting machines.
application: Hard ferrous materials with hardness 40–60 HRC

title: Plain Cut-off Wheel – Soft Ferrous
description: Plain abrasive cut-off wheels for soft to medium ferrous materials and cast iron.
application: Ferrous materials with hardness up to 40 HRC

title: Plain Cut-off Wheel – Non-Ferrous & Cast Iron
description: Abrasive cut-off wheels for non-ferrous materials, ferrous and cast iron.
application: Non-ferrous materials, ferrous & cast iron

title: Breakage Resistant Wheel – Partially Reinforced
description: Partially reinforced abrasive cut-off wheels with improved breakage resistance for tough cutting applications.
application: Ferrous materials with hardness up to 40 HRC. More breakage resistant for tough cutting applications.

title: Breakage Resistant Wheel – Fully Reinforced
description: Fully reinforced abrasive cut-off wheels for heavy-duty cutting on hard ferrous materials.
application: Hard ferrous materials with hardness up to 60 HRC. Suited to heavy-duty components.

title: Cut-off Wheel – High Hardness Steel (50–65 HRC)
description: Abrasive cut-off wheels for high hardened and graded steel material with hardness 50–65 HRC.
application: Materials with hardness 50–65 HRC. High hardened and graded steel.

title: Supreme Cutting Finish Wheel – USA Grade (Abrasive Machines)
description: Premium USA grade abrasive cut-off wheels for abrasive cutting machines. Superior finish across a wide range of materials.
application: Tool steels, cast iron, hardened steels, medium hard steels, super alloys, aluminium, brass, titanium and zirconium.
notes: MOQ: 10 Pcs. Delivery 5 to 6 weeks. Rubber bonded wheels for high quality burn-free sectioning also available.
variants: Medium Hard Steels and Super alloys (35–50 HRC)

title: Supreme Cutting Finish Wheel – USA Grade (Precision Machines)
description: Premium USA grade abrasive cut-off wheels for precision cutting machines.
application: General ferrous, non-ferrous, titanium and other alloys.
notes: Rubber bonded wheels for high quality burn-free sectioning also available.
variants: Soft to medium hard ferrous (below 45 HRC)

title: Precision Cut-off Wheel – Soft to Medium Materials
description: Precision cut-off wheels for small components and thin slicing on abrasive cutting machines. For soft to medium materials.
application: Medium soft steels, thin cut, cast iron, cast steel, KS steel, brass, bronze, aluminium alloys, tungsten molybdenum alloy, pure titanium, lead alloy, glass (15–35 HRC)
notes: MOQ: 10 Nos. Delivery 5 to 6 weeks. Imported items.

title: Precision Cut-off Wheel – Hard Ferrous Materials
description: Precision cut-off wheels for small components and thin slicing of hard ferrous alloys on abrasive cutting machines.
application: Hard ferrous alloys, alloy tool steel, bearing steel, stainless steel, heat resistant steel, invar steel, silicon steel, hardened steels up to 60 HRC
notes: MOQ: 10 Nos. Delivery 5 to 6 weeks. Imported items.

title: Precision Cut-off Wheel – Series 2
description: Precision cut-off wheels for abrasive cutting machines, Series 2.
application: General precision cutting applications
notes: MOQ: 10 Nos. Delivery 5 to 6 weeks. Imported items.

title: Wheel Spacer
description: Spacer to fit 1 inch spindle and wheel. Adapts wheels with 31.75 mm ID to 25.4 mm ID spindles.
application: Adapting precision cut-off wheels to spindle sizes
variants: Fits 1" spindle – adapts 31.75 mm ID wheel to 25.4 mm ID

title: Diamond Wafering Blade – Japanese Grade
description: Japanese grade diamond wafering blades for precision cutting of ceramics, glass, copper, iron and hard non-metallic materials.
application: Alumina ceramic, silicon-nitride ceramic, glass, copper, iron, ruby, quartz, silica

title: Diamond Wafering Blade – Regular Grade
description: Regular grade diamond wafering blades for precision saws. Ceramics, composites, hard ferrous materials.
application: Ceramics, carbides, boron composites, glass, refractory, polymers, PC boards, titanium, thermal spray coating, hard ferrous materials
variants: Ceramics, carbides, boron composites, glass, refractory (above 60 HRC)

title: CBN Wafering Blade – Regular Grade
description: Regular grade CBN (Cubic Boron Nitride) wafering blades for precision saws. Ideal for high speed steels and superalloys.
application: High speed steels, Inconel, Stellite, iron and cobalt based alloys, nickel based super alloys, lead base alloys, titanium alloys, stainless steels

title: CBN Wafering Blade – Premium Grade
description: Premium grade CBN wafering blades for precision saws. Superior performance for tough superalloys and hard steels at high speed.
application: High speed steels, Inconel, Stellite, iron and cobalt based alloys, nickel based super alloys, lead base alloys, titanium alloys, stainless steels (high speed)

title: Diamond Cut-off Wheel
description: Diamond cut-off blades for use in diamond saws. Suitable for cutting carbide rods and hard materials.
application: Carbide rod cutting and hard material sectioning
notes: Diamond and CBN wheels to be handled with care. Right grade to be chosen by the customer.

title: Cutting Fluid & Coolant
description: Corrosion-free coolant and cutting fluids for abrasive and precision cutting machines.
application: Coolant systems for abrasive and precision cutting saws
notes: Change coolant fully at least once in 3 months. Top up at least once a week. Do not mix LSS Oil with water.
variants: Oil-based coolant. Reduces cutting cycle time. For precision saws. Do not mix with water.

title: Dressing Sticks & Filter Bags
description: Dressing sticks to maintain diamond wafering blade performance. Filter bags to collect cutting debris and sludge.
application: Maintenance of diamond wafering blades and grinding discs. Coolant filtration.

title: Phenolic Mounting Powder – Standard Grade
description: Compression mounting powder for routine metallographic analysis. Fast cycle time. Available in multiple colours.
application: Regular analysis with fast cycle time

title: Transparent Mounting Powder – Standard Grade
description: Compression mounting powder for applications requiring complete visibility of the sample. Good flow characteristics.
application: Applications requiring complete visibility of the sample

title: Conductive Mounting Powder – Standard Grade
description: Conductive compression mounting powder for SEM (Scanning Electron Microscope) analysis.
application: SEM analysis requiring conductive sample

title: Copper Conductive Mounting Powder
description: Copper-filled conductive powder for SEM analysis. Excellent electrical conductivity.
application: SEM analysis requiring highly conductive copper-filled sample

title: Mold Release Spray & Powder
description: Anti-stick agents for hot mounting chamber walls for easy removal of the mold.
application: Applied on mounting chamber walls before hot compression mounting

title: Phenolic Mounting Powder – Premium Grade
description: Premium grade compression mounting powder for medium hard materials. Moderate edge retention.
application: Regular analysis of medium hard materials with moderate edge retention

title: Epoxy Powder – Fine Glass Filled (Premium)
description: Fine glass filled epoxy compression mounting powder. Excellent edge retention for coating thickness and case depth measurement.
application: Coating thickness measurement, case depth measurement, fastener profile analysis on hard materials. Excellent edge retention.

title: Diallyl Phthalate – Glass Filled (Premium)
description: Glass filled DAP compression mounting powder. More abrasion resistant than mineral filled. Excellent edge retention.
application: High end applications on hard materials. Excellent edge retention.

title: Diallyl Phthalate – Mineral Filled (Premium)
description: Mineral filled DAP compression mounting powder for high end applications on moderately hard materials. Excellent edge retention.
application: Coating thickness and case depth measurement on moderately hard materials. Excellent edge retention.

title: Transparent Mounting Powder – Premium Grade
description: Premium grade transparent compression mounting powder. Complete sample visibility. Fair edge retention.
application: Applications requiring complete visibility of the sample. Fair edge retention.

title: Technotherm 3000 – Conductive Powder
description: Conductive compression mounting powder for SEM analysis. Moderate edge retention.
application: SEM analysis requiring conductive sample. Moderate edge retention.

title: Cold Mounting Compound – Standard
description: Standard two-component cold mounting system. Powder and liquid. General purpose for everyday metallographic sample preparation.
application: General day-to-day sample preparation. Pink opaque colour.

title: Technovit Epox – Transparent Embedding
description: German grade Technovit Epox cold mounting. Transparent high clear embedding. Vacuum impregnation required.
application: Transparent high clear embedding. Vacuum impregnation required.
notes: Components: Resin 1000 ml, Hardener Regular A 1000 ml, Hardener Fast B 1000 ml

title: Technovit 4000 – Gap Free Non-Shrinkage
description: Gap free, non-shrinkage cold mounting. White coloured opaque mold. Three-component system.
application: Gap free, non-shrinkage embedding. White coloured opaque mold.

title: Technovit 4006 – High Clear Embedding
description: German grade high clear embedding cold mounting system. Vacuum unit required.
application: High clear embedding. Vacuum unit required.

title: Technovit 4006 SE – Semi-Transparent Improved Grinding
description: High clear semi-transparent mounting with improved grinding properties. Vacuum unit required.
application: High clear semi-transparent mould. Improved grinding properties. Vacuum unit required.

title: Technovit 4071 – Quick Embedding
description: Green semi-transparent cold mounting system for quick embedding.
application: Green semi-transparent mold, quick embedding.

title: Technovit 5071 – Green Semi-Transparent
description: Green semi-transparent cold mounting. Dissolves in acetone.
application: Green semi-transparent embedding. Dissolves in acetone.

title: Technovit 5000 – Conductive Cold Mounting
description: Conductive material embedding. Brown opaque mold for SEM analysis.
application: Conductive material embedding for SEM analysis. Brown opaque mold.

title: Technovit Universal Liquid
description: Universal liquid component for Technovit cold mounting systems.
application: Universal liquid component for Technovit cold mounting systems

title: Technovit 3040 – Precision Impression (1 µm accuracy)
description: Precision impression compound for indirect surface inspection. 1 µm dimensional accuracy.
application: Indirect surface inspection. 1 µm dimensional accuracy.
notes: Choose Technovit 3040 for 1 µm accuracy, Provil Novo for < 0.1 µm accuracy.

title: Provil Novo – Ultra Precision Impression (< 0.1 µm)
description: Ultra-precision impression compounds for < 0.1 µm dimensional accuracy. Putty and light versions available.
application: Indirect surface inspection requiring < 0.1 µm dimensional accuracy.
notes: Base 450 ml + Catalyst 450 ml per pack

title: Rubber Mould – Standard Grade
description: Reusable rubber moulds for cold mounting in standard sizes.
application: Cold mounting mold for sample preparation

title: Rubber Mould – Premium Quality (US Grade)
description: Premium quality long-life US grade rubber moulds for cold mounting.
application: Cold mounting mold – longer life

title: Metallic Die
description: Metallic dies for cold mounting sample preparation.
application: Cold mounting die

title: Reusable Plastic Mould
description: Reusable plastic mould for cold mounting.
application: Cold mounting mold, reusable

title: Mounting Clips
description: Plastic and metal holding clips for cold mounting. Available in standard and premium USA grades.
application: Holding samples during cold mounting

title: Mixing Cup & Spatula – German Grade
description: Mixing cups and spatulas for preparing cold mounting compounds.
application: Mixing cold mounting compounds

title: PCB Mounting Cups
description: Specialised mounting cups for PCB (printed circuit board) sample cross-section analysis.
application: PCB cross-section analysis, multiple sample mounting

description: Standard grade abrasive belt for planar grinding of ferrous and non-ferrous materials.
application: Coarse grinding of general ferrous and non-ferrous materials

description: Economy grade abrasive belt for planar grinding. Cost-effective for general materials.

title: Linishing Belt

title: SiC Grinding Belt
description: Silicon carbide abrasive belt. High bonding strength. Also suitable for petrography samples.

title: Premium Magnetic Disc System
description: Magnetic substrate disc and ferromagnetic carrier sheet system. Reduces time replacing PSA-backed consumables.

title: Diamond Embedded Disc – Apollo S (Resin Bonded, German)
description: Resin bonded diamond embedded disc. Replaces conventional SiC discs. Processes 6000–8000 samples. Minimises edge rounding.
application: Fine grinding of hard ferrous materials. Nitride and oxide layer grinding without chipping.
notes: Lubricant: Water / water-free for corrosive materials. PSA and metal backed options available.

title: Diamond Embedded Disc – Squadro M (Patterned, German)
description: Patterned surface resin bonded diamond disc. Reduces grinding time versus Apollo and Carat discs.
application: Faster grinding on hard ferrous and general metallographic samples
notes: Patterned surface. PSA and metal backed options available.

title: Diamond Embedded Disc – Plato (Metal Bonded, German)
description: Metal bonded diamond embedded disc for high hardness ferrous, concrete and ceramics.
application: High hardness ferrous material, concrete and ceramics
notes: Lubricant: Water / water-free for corrosive materials. PSA and metal backed options available.

title: Diamond Embedded Disc – Flexible Magnetic Backing
description: Flexible magnetic backing diamond discs for quick-change magnetic substrate systems. Economy and standard options.
application: General grinding applications with magnetic backing system

title: Diamond Embedded Disc – Micron (Metal Bonded, USA Grade)
description: USA grade metal bonded diamond embedded discs with PSA backing for precision grinding.
application: Precision grinding applications

title: Spectrographic Grinding Disc
description: Large coarse alumina abrasive discs for grinding samples prior to spectrographic analysis.
application: Coarse grinding of large samples prior to spectrographic analysis

title: Portable Grinding Disc
description: Grinding discs for portable grinding machines. Used for on-site testing of workpieces in foundries, welding shops, fabrication plants.
application: On-site grinding in foundries, welding shops, fabrication plants, steel mills, forge shops and shipyards.

title: Polishing Cloth – Indian Grade (Without PSA)
description: Indian grade polishing cloths. Available in Velvet, Micro Cloth, Selvyt and Billards types. Without PSA backing.

description: Indian grade polishing cloths with PSA backing. Available in 8" and 10".

Velvet Brown Premium, 30 mm, with PSA

description: Diamond paste for metallographic polishing. Available in 1, 3 and 6 micron grades. Use with lubricant.

title: Diamond Paste – USA Grade (Monocrystalline, Water & Oil Soluble)
description: USA grade monocrystalline diamond paste. Water and oil soluble. Available in 5g, 10g and 20g.
application: High quality metallographic polishing on polishing cloths
notes: Water and oil soluble. Available in 5g, 10g and 20g.

title: Diamond Polishing Lubricant
description: Lubricants for use with diamond pastes and slurries. Alcohol, water and oil based. Available in multiple volumes.
application: Used with diamond pastes and diamond slurries during metallographic polishing
notes: Available in quart (950 ml), gallon (3.8L) and 5 gallon (19L).

title: Diamond Aerosol Spray – USA Grade
description: USA grade diamond aerosol spray. Convenient spray application of diamond compound on polishing cloths. 150 ml per can.
application: Metallographic polishing – spray application on polishing cloths

title: Premium Diamond Suspension
description: Premium polycrystalline and monocrystalline water-based diamond suspensions. 240 ml bottles.
application: High quality metallographic polishing
notes: 240 ml per bottle. Polycrystalline and monocrystalline available.

title: Economy Diamond Suspension
description: Economy grade polycrystalline and monocrystalline water-based diamond suspensions. 240 ml bottles.

title: Alumina Polishing Compound
description: Alumina compounds for ultra-fine polishing. Available as powder, fast pol suspension and premium de-agglomerated suspensions.

title: Colloidal Silica Polishing Suspension
description: Colloidal silica suspension for final ultra-fine polishing of metallographic samples.

title: Metallurgical Reference Charts
description: Large format laminated reference charts for metallurgical laboratories. Hardness conversion, grain size, inclusion rating and iron-carbon diagram.
application: Laboratory reference for metallographic analysis

title: Nital Etchant
description: Nital etchant for metallographic etching of ferrous samples to reveal microstructure.

description: General laboratory consumables and accessories for metallographic sample preparation and analysis.
